field_details.target: relative returns vs all peers (computed from close)
relative returns vs comp peers (computed from close)
relative returns vs cust peers (computed from close)
relative returns vs part peers (computed from close)

wrds_guide.name: CRSP Daily Stock File
wrds_guide.description: Stock prices, returns, market cap, shares outstanding
wrds_guide.sql_template:
SELECT permno, date, prc, ret, retx, shrout, vol, cfacpr, cfacshr, bidlo, askhi
FROM crsp.dsf
WHERE date BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
  AND permno IN (SELECT permno FROM crsp.dsenames
                 WHERE ticker IN ({tickers}))
ORDER BY permno, date;

wrds_guide.name: CRSP Monthly Stock File
wrds_guide.sql_template:
SELECT permno, date, prc, ret, retx, shrout, vol
FROM crsp.msf
WHERE date BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY permno, date;

wrds_guide.name: Compustat Annual Fundamentals
wrds_guide.description: Annual fundamental data (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow)
wrds_guide.sql_template:
SELECT gvkey, datadate, fyear, sale, ebitda, ni, oibdp,
       at, lt, ceq, capx, dp, xsga, xrd, revt, cogs,
       txt, oiadp, csho, prcc_f, epspx, epsfi
FROM comp.funda
WHERE indfmt = 'INDL'
  AND datafmt = 'STD'
  AND popsrc = 'D'
  AND consol = 'C'
  AND datadate BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY gvkey, datadate;

wrds_guide.name: Compustat Quarterly Fundamentals
wrds_guide.sql_template:
SELECT gvkey, datadate, rdq, fqtr, fyearq,
       saleq, niq, oibdpq, atq, ltq, ceqq, capxq,
       cshoq, epspxq
FROM comp.fundq
WHERE indfmt = 'INDL'
  AND datafmt = 'STD'
  AND popsrc = 'D'
  AND consol = 'C'
  AND datadate BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY gvkey, datadate;

wrds_guide.name: IBES Detail Estimates
wrds_guide.sql_template:
SELECT ticker, analys, fpedats, estimator, value,
       estcur, pdf, fpi
FROM ibes.det_epsus
WHERE fpedats BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY ticker, fpedats;

wrds_guide.name: IBES Summary Statistics
wrds_guide.description: Consensus analyst estimates (mean, median, high, low, count)
wrds_guide.sql_template:
SELECT ticker, statpers, fpedats, fpi,
       meanest, medest, highest, lowest,
       numest, actual, stdev
FROM ibes.statsum_epsus
WHERE statpers BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY ticker, statpers;

wrds_guide.name: OptionMetrics Implied Volatility Surface
wrds_guide.sql_template:
SELECT secid, date, exdate, cp_flag,
       strike_price / 1000 AS strike,
       impl_volatility, delta, gamma, vega, theta,
       best_bid, best_offer, volume, open_interest
FROM optionm.opprcd
WHERE date BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
ORDER BY secid, date, exdate, strike_price;

wrds_guide.name: Ravenpack News Analytics
wrds_guide.description: News sentiment scores and event data
wrds_guide.sql_template:
SELECT rp_entity_id, timestamp_utc,
       event_sentiment_score, relevance, novelty,
       event_type, topic, headline
FROM ravenpack.rp_entity_news_v3
WHERE timestamp_utc BETWEEN '{start_date}' AND '{end_date}'
  AND relevance >= 75
ORDER BY timestamp_utc;
